12210.title: Use OpenGL instead of DirectX
12210.description: Grand Theft Auto IV performs better with OpenGL on some GPUs

292030.title: Enable NVIDIA DLSS
292030.description: The Witcher 3 supports DLSS on NVIDIA GPUs via Proton

292030.title: Hide NVIDIA GPU info
292030.description: Some anti-cheat may flag NVAPI. Hide GPU info if needed.

1091500.title: Enable large address aware
1091500.description: Cyberpunk 2077 can benefit from large address aware mode

1091500.title: Enable NVIDIA DLSS / RTX
1091500.description: Enable NVAPI for DLSS and ray tracing support

1174180.title: Force Vulkan renderer
1174180.description: Red Dead Redemption 2 may crash with DX12; force Vulkan

1245620.title: Enable EAC runtime
1245620.description: Elden Ring uses Easy Anti-Cheat which needs Proton EAC runtime

413150.title: Enable BattlEye runtime
413150.description: Stardew Valley multiplayer may need BattlEye compatibility

570.title: Disable Steam overlay
570.description: Dota 2 overlay can cause rendering issues on some systems

_common.title: Disable Esync
_common.description: Fixes crashes in games that don't support Esync properly

_common.title: Disable Fsync
_common.description: Fixes crashes in games that don't support Fsync properly

_common.title: Use system Wine D3D
_common.description: Use Wine's OpenGL-based D3D instead of DXVK Vulkan

_common.title: Enable NVIDIA NVAPI
_common.description: Required for DLSS and some NVIDIA-specific features
